content.text:
I can create the manifest file with the correct name (`20260323_dependency_version_manifest.json`), but I don’t currently have any source of truth for dependency versions in this workspace (no `package-lock.json`, `pom.xml`, `requirements.txt`, `go.mod`, etc., and `ci_build_raw.txt` doesn’t list versions).

Please provide one of the following so I can extract the *current* versions accurately:

1) The project lockfile(s) / manifest(s) (e.g., `package-lock.json` / `pnpm-lock.yaml` / `poetry.lock` / `requirements.txt` / `pom.xml` / `go.mod`, etc.), or  
2) A snippet/output from your CI dependency step showing resolved versions, or  
3) A list of the “main dependency libraries” you want included (and where their versions are recorded).
